hard.exp: Anakula ela kana tumbo, ananwa ela kana mlomo — He eats but has no stomach, drinks but has no mouth. Answer: Fire

hard.q: "God's word is a seed without end" — Which Digo riddle matches?
opts: Mtu yuno anakaa chini ya madzi, anafwa dzulu ya moho
Anakuja na nyenyezi, anahenda na dzuwa
Neno ra Mlungu ni mbegu isiyo mwisho
hard.exp: Neno ra Mlungu ni mbegu isiyo mwisho — God's word is a seed without end. Answer: Word

hard.q: "This person sits under water, dies on top of fire" — Which Digo riddle matches?
opts: Mchetu mtsere anakudza kpwa mvula, anahenda kpwa dzuwa
Mzee ana sauti kubwa ela si simba
Neno ra Mlungu ni upanga wa pande mbiri
Mtu yuno anakaa chini ya madzi, anafwa dzulu ya moho
hard.exp: Mtu yuno anakaa chini ya madzi, anafwa dzulu ya moho — This person sits under water, dies on top of fire. Answer: Clay pot

hard.q: "He has two wings but is not a bird, many eyes but is not a person" — Which Digo riddle matches?
opts: Ana mkia mrefu ela si nyoka, ana masikiro makulu ela si ndzovu
Anafwa chila usiku, anafufuka chila ligundzu
Ana phiko mbiri ela si nyuni, ana matso manji ela si mutu
hard.exp: Ana phiko mbiri ela si nyuni, ana matso manji ela si mutu — He has two wings but is not a bird, many eyes but is not a person. Answer: Butterfly

hard.q: "The last riddle: God is greater than any riddle" — Which Digo riddle matches?
opts: Chimbunga cha mwisho: Mlungu yu mkubwa kuriko chimbunga chochosi
Mchetu mweusi ana chitswa cha moho
Anakula kpwa madzi, ela si samaki
hard.exp: Chimbunga cha mwisho: Mlungu yu mkubwa kuriko chimbunga chochosi — The last riddle: God is greater than any riddle. Answer: God
